expectations.text: Report includes scores for all 5 modules (list_tasks.get, create_task.post, get_task.get, update_task.put, delete_task.delete)
expectations.evidence: All 5 modules listed in the table with individual scores

expectations.text: Each module score breaks down into 7 dimensions: description, schema descriptions, documentation, annotations, examples, tags, intent metadata
expectations.evidence: Table header: Desc | Schema | Docs | Annot | Ex | Tags | Intent — all 7 dimensions present

expectations.text: list_tasks.get scores highest among the 5 modules
Report identifies common issues across modules
expectations.evidence: Top Issues section lists 6 findings including missing schema descriptions, no documentation, no examples, no tags, no x-when-to-use
